title: Fixed-target absence
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Draft a Goal to optimize test quality and latency. The repository has measurable commands but no approved numeric target. Inspect it and stop before activation.

title: Unbiased parser comparison
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Draft a reviewed Goal for the frozen baseline-versus-candidate parser evaluation in EVAL.md. Do not favor the candidate or run the evaluation.

title: Bounded technical investigation
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Draft a Goal to determine why calculator results differ on case C17. This is an investigation, not a request to repair or optimize. Stop before activation.

title: Already-achieved target
prompt: $goal-draft-policy The documented target is simply that npm test passes, and it already passes according to STATUS.md. Decide suitability before drafting; do not invent a replacement objective.

title: No repository artifact
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Prepare a reviewed Goal for synthesizing the supplied research brief and evidence table. There is no repository. Do not assume commands or activate the Goal.

title: Monorepo command scope
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Draft a Goal for aligning API package validation with the monorepo workflow. Ground root and package commands separately and stop before activation.

title: CI package mismatch
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Review the CI/package mismatch documented by the files and draft a Goal that does not quietly choose one command as authoritative. Stop before activation.

title: Measurement unavailable
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Draft a Goal to decide whether the brief's proposal is usable, but evidence.tsv has no reliable latency measurements. Do not create a latency threshold.

title: Do not over-repair healthy Goal
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Critique the Goal in HEALTHY_GOAL.md. Preserve it if it already meets the evidence; make only necessary changes and do not activate it.

title: Node migration contract
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Draft a human-reviewable Goal for the API-client migration in MIGRATION.md, using actual commands and constraints. Stop before activation.

title: Concrete Python blocker
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Draft a Goal for the packaging cleanup. A missing private signing certificate may block release but must not block local validation. Stop before activation.

title: Go scope constraints
prompt: $goal-draft-policy Draft a Goal for evaluating the candidate parser without changing public APIs or the frozen case population. Stop before activation.
